Vietnam Freelancer Guide 2026

Published on 7/18/2026

Introduction

If you want to find freelancers in Vietnam, the very first thing you should do is adjust your expectations. Vietnamese girls are not generally known for giving the best service. Especially on the lower price tier (under VND 1mil), you will find many chicks that only do the bare minimum in the shortest amount of time possible. On the other hand, if you do your research in advance and are willing to experiment (and have the time for that), you can find girls that give great performance just like in Thailand.

In general, there are two types of freelancers:

  1. Gaito girls: these women mainly cater to local Vietnamese guys. They usually don't speak much English or none at all. The usual price range is 500k-1mil VND. You find them on sites like Anchoi, Banhbeo and Checkerviet.
  2. Independent freelancers: these girls are more expensive and often have a very good grasp of English. The higher price means they can see fewer clients and dedicate more time to each one of them. This usually results in higher satisfaction from the client's side. They can be either found on international sites like Massage Republic or on dating apps like Tinder, Bumble and Tantan.

There are also always some foreigners active on both the local Gaito sites as well as on Massage Republic. Most of them are Russians and Philippinas. On the Gaito sites, they usually go for around 4mil/shot.

Independent freelancers

If you want to find independent freelancers, you have these options:

  • Massage Republic: this site has the most active freelancers and is reputable. Scammers are also present, but you can filter by reviewed or verified profiles to minimize chances of being scammed. There are also a couple of agents there, like agent Kevin who often gets good reviews from foreigners.
  • Dating apps and messengers: independent freelancers are active on Tinder, Tantan, Bumble, WeChat and Line. For the latter two, use the Find Nearby feature.

Rules

Always follow these simple rules when choosing a freelancer:

  1. No video call, no meet. Don't risk it. Always request a video call in advance to make sure she is who she claims to be.
  2. Never be afraid to reject her. If anyting feels off, just walk away.
  3. And hence: meet in a public place. If you don't like her, it will be very easy for you to just reject her vs when she already is at your place.
  4. Never pay in advance. Only pay after you are finished. Otherwise, the risk of her giving bad service increases a lot, because she already has the money. The only exception might be if she requests a taxi fee for getting to your place. This should only be a few 10k VND at most and you should also be prepared to lose that money in the worst case.
  5. Don't leave any valuables in plain sight in your room. Don't leave her alone.

Prices

As for prices, they can vary wildly depending on the girl. On average it will be around VND 1-3mil for short term and VND 3-6mil for long term.

Gaito

Gaito sites

Gaito girls can be found on local escort sites. These sites keep changing Urls. Google the name provided in order to find the latest valid domain name:

  • Anchoi.xxx: this one was previously called Gaigu.net. It has a good selection and lots of girls with videos.
  • Banhbeo.net: very similar to anchoi.xxx.
  • Checkerviet: the profiles of Checkerviet heavily concentrate on North Vietnam, especially Hanoi and Hải Phòng. There are virtually no real reviews, no videos and only heavily edited pictures.
  • Rphang: this is a local sex forum and escort directory. Mostly has girls in the south. Not that much selection.

Gaito profiles

Some things to note about Gaito profiles: Overnight - this usually only means from around 11-12pm to 6-7am. They will already be tired at that time. Moreover, overnight is usually limited to two shots. So, this really isn't recommended, unless you already know the girl. Images - the profile images are always heavily photoshopped. Discount them by 50%. Always check reviews when available to get more realistic pictures.

Procedure for meeting a Gaito Girl

  1. Prepare

Check freelancer profiles carefully. Besides the ratings, things to watch out for are working hours and extra fees. Some girls charge extra for serving foreigners. The fee is often around VND 200k. It may also be higher. That's why it is advisable to let the girl know in advance that you aren't Vietnamese. That way, there won't be any surprises.

As for the location, be aware that the further out from central districts - like District 1 in Saigon - you go, the less English the girls will know. Actually, it might be worth skipping District 1 altogether, because girls there charge quite a bit more than in other districts. Check out other locations like District 8, District 10 or Tân Phú.

Something else to point out is that it is always a good idea to find more than just one girl, ideally at the same hotel or at least very close to each other. The reason is that no-shows happen. So, it's best to have one or two back-ups.

  1. Initiate Contact

Text the girl. It is worth noting that many girls are managed by agents. So, it might be the agent that is responding, rather than the girl. The first message should be something simple. The easiest way is to just ask "em ở đâu?" ("Where are you?") or "em có làm không?" ("Are you on duty?"). The girl will then respond with the hotel she receives customers at.

Now, it's best to let her know your nationality. Ask if she charges extra for that. She might actually refuse service altogether. This is to be expected. Some of them have preferences due to various reasons, such as language barrier, discomfort with large penis size or simple outright dislike for people from certain countries. Just accept it. If you encounter a rejection, just keep searching. There are plenty of girls available.

Note: many girls are only available through SMS. That said, some also have Telegram or Zalo accounts (check here if you have trouble signing up). I also keep a spreadsheet with valid TG and Zalo accounts from Gaito girls.

  1. Go to the Hotel

Once you know the hotel, go there. If she responded to your message, that means she is working. Don't wait too long or she might be off by that time already. It's best to bring your own condoms, just to be sure. Most likely, she will bring her own. But especially if you are on the larger side, you might not fit the regular Vietnamese sized condoms.

The hotels are often cheap guesthouses with few amenities. They cost anywhere from around 50k-200k/hour. The room fee has to be paid by you. Note that these hotels collaborate together with the girls. Any one of these hotels might have several girls working out of it. Police raids can and do happen occasionally. However, they are rare.

  1. Meet Her

Now, it's time to message her and let her know that you arrived as well as the room number. She should respond quickly. Unfortunately, this doesn't mean she will show up just as promptly. It might take up to 30 minutes until the girl arrives. So, be patient. When she arrives, it's time to have fun!

It can also happen that the girl either doesn't show up or instead, a different girl shows up. In the first case, you might want to try and contact some of your back-up girls (or try to find one if you don't have one yet). In the second case, it's usually advised that you just pay and then either leave or ask her to leave.

Other options

Glow

Glow is an app for legit massage at home. Some girls actually also offer extras, including FS. The problem is that you don't know for sure until you meet her (and are able to ask). According to reports, if a girl has reviews from Koreans, they usually do provide extras. Note that just like with Gaito, the photos are usually heavily edited. When you download the app, you won't see all profiles. You need to get the subscription to have access to all of them. Age is also hidden unless you subscribe.

Agents

There are some agents that provide girls. The best known one is Agent Kevin. You can contact him on Whatsapp or Telegram at +840868976618. Another one is Zu Massage. They are only available on Zalo: +84777593205.

Seeking

There are a few girls on Seeking that are willing to become sugar babies. That said, their asking rates are very high (like $500/day).
